title: Nordic Ware 6pc Cups Bundt Measuring, Set of 6, Sea Glass
description:
About this item
Smooth on the inside with iconic Nordic Ware flutes on the outside
Includes 1, 3/4, 2/3, 1/2, 1/3, and 1/4 measuring cups
BPA-free and Melamine Free Plastic, High-Heat Plastic
Top-rack dishwasher safe
Made in the USA
reviews_5s:
So many measuring cups give you just 1/4, 1/3, 1/2, full cup. These have the volumes in between, 2/3, 3/4. I looked everywhere to find a set with all the volumes, and this one has them. I love the soft green color, too. They're sturdy, so the handle isn't likely to break off when you're scooping out honey or cornmeal. Really nice.Love the Bundt pan shape on the outside, so cute! Solid feeling cups that stack nicely. These are exactly what I need! Would recommend.Very happy with these measuring cups, made in the USA, sturdy, measurements clearly marked and they're a great color.All Nordicware items are top quality and made in USA!
Really cute tooWell madeI have a habit of snapping the handles on my last couple of measuring cups. These are very study and I feel that they will last without snapping the handles. Good choice.I bought this set of measuring cups by Nordic Ware because I've heard good things about the company. This is a nice set that has a little weight to it. Excellent for the price.Hard to find a set made in USA ,these are !I love using these because I lived in the town they are made in and it brings joy to me. they are very durable and stack nicely. I can see my grand daughter using themThese are more of a soft blue in person, almost like french blue. I gave 5 stars because that is what I had hoped for!
reviews_1s: The first time I got this it was missing one of the measuring cups. So I requested a replacement from Amazon which I did get however one of the measuring cups was cracked. I really wanted these measuring cups because at the time the price was really good and I like this brand. Amazon would not get me another replacement so basically I had to cancel the whole order. So really my complaint with this company is their quality control.
